overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character exploring an abandoned subway station and dark underground tunnels. The character navigates through graffiti-covered corridors with a flashlight and weapon, transitioning from a dimly lit platform to pitch-black train tunnels.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned subway platform with fluorescent lighting

events.description: character discovers blood stains on the platform floor near the edge

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the subway platform with flashlight and gun drawn, scanning the graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: green illuminated sign reading NOT IN SERVICE hanging from the station ceiling
thick cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the station roof
white tiled walls covered in colorful spray paint graffiti tags
yellow painted warning line along the edge of the platform
illuminated billboards and informational signs on the platform walls

segments.scene_description: The character explores an abandoned subway platform bathed in greenish fluorescent light. A 'NOT IN SERVICE' sign hangs overhead while graffiti covers the tiled walls. The character moves past concrete pillars and illuminated posters, discovering blood stains on the ground near the platform edge.

events.description: character reaches the end of the platform and begins descending the stairwell
environment shifts from green fluorescent to near darkness with red emergency lighting

agents.ego_description: carefully descending the stairs into the lower track level, flashlight sweeping across the walls

entered.detail: yellow painted metal handrail along the concrete stairwell
pitch black opening leading into the underground train tunnels

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the platform and descends a stairwell with yellow safety railings. The lighting transitions dramatically from green fluorescent to near-total darkness, with only the flashlight and faint red emergency lights illuminating the path into the tunnel entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark underground train tunnel with tracks

events.description: character steps onto the train tracks and enters the main tunnel corridor

agents.ego_description: walking along the train tracks through the dark tunnel, using the flashlight to reveal the path ahead

entered.detail: metal railroad tracks with wooden ties running through the tunnel floor
large metal pipes and electrical conduits running along the tunnel walls
white painted metal gate structure blocking part of the tunnel ahead

segments.scene_description: The character navigates the pitch-black underground tunnel, walking directly on the train tracks. Industrial pipes line the concrete walls while the flashlight beam cuts through the darkness, revealing graffiti tags and a metal barrier gate in the distance. The atmosphere is claustrophobic and tense as the character proceeds deeper into the tunnel system.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sickly lit subway platform into the oppressive darkness of an underground tunnel system. It begins on an abandoned platform bathed in greenish fluorescent light, moving past graffiti-covered tiles and concrete pillars toward blood stains near the platform edge. As the character reaches the end of the station, the scene shifts downward through a stairwell with yellow safety railings, where the green glow fades into near-total darkness punctuated only by faint red emergency lights. The camera then proceeds into a pitch-black tunnel, transitioning from the open platform to a claustrophobic space where a flashlight beam cuts through the dark to reveal industrial pipes and graffiti along the concrete walls. Finally, the movement continues directly along the train tracks, pushing deeper into the tunnel toward a distant metal barrier gate.
